hero.title: 🦸 Be a Gluco Hero! 🦸
hero.subtitle: Turn diabetes management into an epic adventure with your companions!
hero.description: Play games. Build habits. Earn rewards. Make friends with Leo, Fiona, or Ellie.

games.title: 🎮 Play 6 Awesome Mini-Games
games.bloodSugarDesc: Tap your finger and see the results. Quick & simple!
games.hypoHyperDesc: Learn to identify symptoms and make smart choices.
games.buildPlateDesc: Tap and drag to create healthy, balanced meals.
games.balanceRunDesc: Run forward and collect good items, avoid bad ones!
games.dailyTrackerDesc: Check off your daily missions and earn awesome rewards!
games.learnTogetherDesc: Interactive lessons about your body and health.

features.title: ✨ What Makes Glucoheros Special
features.emotionalDesc: Your hero reacts to your behavior! Happy when you play, sad if you've been away too long.
features.earnUnlockDesc: Collect coins, gain XP, unlock badges. Watch your hero evolve with cool accessories!
features.dailyMissionsDesc: Fun daily tasks that build healthy habits without pressure or stress.
features.privacyFirstDesc: No data collection. No tracking. Just you and your hero. Complete peace of mind.
features.quickGamesDesc: Each game is only 30-60 seconds. Perfect for busy kids!
features.plushToyDesc: Get your hero as a real plush toy to hold and hug!

home.economyDescMain: Play games to earn coins and XP. Use your coins to unlock cosmetics, time boosts, and special items.
home.economyFooter: Everything is earned through gameplay. Our in-game economy is 100% money-free!
home.happyDesc: When you play games and complete missions!
home.neutralDesc: When you haven't played for a while.
home.sadDesc: If you've been away too long. Time to visit!

cta.title: Ready to Save the Day?

hero.title: 💬 Questions?
hero.subtitle: We're here to help! Pick your preferred way to reach us.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.emailDesc: Send us an email anytime. We typically respond within 24 hours.
contact.phoneDesc: Need immediate help? Call during business hours (IST).

faq.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.priceAnswer: Glucoheros is a one-time payment of 29.9 ILS (~$8 USD). This gives you lifetime access to the entire app—no ads, no subscriptions, no hidden fees. Download it once, play forever!
faq.age: 👶 What age is the app designed for?
faq.ageAnswer: Glucoheros is designed for kids ages 4-8 with Type 1 Diabetes. The games are simple, fun, and age-appropriate. The app uses large text, bright colors, and quick interactions perfect for young children.
faq.dataAnswer: We collect ONLY a randomly generated username (that users can customize later if they want). We DO NOT ask for names, emails, phone numbers, or any personal information. We DO NOT track usage outside the app. Your privacy is our top priority!
faq.gamesAnswer: There are 6 mini-games: Blood Sugar Test, Hypo or Hyper?, Build a Healthy Plate, Balance Run, Daily Tracker, and Learn Together. Each game is 30-60 seconds and teaches important diabetes management skills through play!
faq.mood: 🎭 Why does my hero have different moods?
faq.moodAnswer: Your hero (Leo, Fiona, or Ellie) reacts emotionally to your behavior! They're happy when you play games, neutral when you haven't played in a bit, and sad if you've been away for too long. This creates an emotional bond and motivates kids to come back and play!
faq.missions: 🏆 What are missions and why should kids complete them?
faq.missionsAnswer: Daily missions are fun tasks like 'play 1 game' or 'log your reading.' Completing them earns coins, XP, and unlocks cool rewards. Missions help kids build healthy daily habits without feeling pressured—it's all game-ified and fun!
faq.devices: 📱 What devices does it work on?
faq.devicesAnswer: Glucoheros works on iOS (iPhone/iPad) and Android devices. You can download it from the App Store or Google Play Store. It's designed to be lightweight and works smoothly on most devices.
faq.badgesAnswer: Badges are rewards for completing milestones (e.g., 'First Blood Test,' '3-Day Streak'). They help kids feel proud of their progress and motivate them to keep going. There are badges for all different achievements!
faq.plush: 🪅 Is there a physical plush toy?
faq.plushAnswer: Yes! You can get Leo, Fiona, or Ellie as a real plush toy to hold and hug. The physical toy pairs with the app to make the experience even more special and personal for kids.
faq.economy: 💰 What's the in-game economy? Do I spend real money?
faq.economyAnswerMain: Glucoheros has an in-game economy using coins that you earn by playing games. You can trade coins for cosmetics, XP boosts, time boosts, and special items.
faq.economyAnswerFooter: Everything is earned through gameplay. No credit cards, no microtransactions, no spending. Just play and earn!
faq.updates: 🔄 How often are new features added?
faq.updatesAnswer: We regularly update Glucoheros with new features, games, and improvements. All updates are FREE for users who already have the app. You get lifetime updates with your one-time purchase!

privacy.title: 🔒 Privacy Policy
privacy.lastUpdated: Last Updated: June 2024 • Your privacy is our priority
privacy.promiseBody: Glucoheros collects ZERO personal information. We don't ask for names, emails, phone numbers, or any identifying data. Your health is private. Your data stays yours.
privacy.random: Random Username: A randomly generated username at app start (e.g., "Hero_12345")
privacy.custom: User-Customizable: Users can change their username anytime if they want
privacy.game: Game Data: Gameplay metrics (games played, scores, progress) stored locally on the device
privacy.notCollectDesc: We explicitly do NOT collect: names, email addresses, phone numbers, dates of birth, location data, medical information, parental contact info, school or family details, usage analytics or tracking, behavioral profiling
privacy.storageDesc: All game data is stored locally on the user's device. We do NOT transmit personal data to servers. Your data stays on your phone/tablet.
privacy.noAdsDesc: Glucoheros is ad-free. We do NOT: include third-party ads, use analytics tools, track user behavior, use cookies or similar technologies, employ behavioral targeting, share data with marketing partners
privacy.childrenDesc: Glucoheros is designed for children ages 4-8. We comply with: COPPA (Children's Online Privacy Protection Act), GDPR (EU), CCPA (California), Israel's Privacy Law. No Parental Consent Needed: Because we don't collect ANY identifiable information, we don't need parental consent to use the app.
privacy.retentionDesc: Game progress is stored locally on the user's device indefinitely until: user deletes the app, user clears device storage, user manually deletes their data. Users can request complete data deletion anytime by contacting us.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: Glucoheros uses minimal third-party services: App Store (Apple/Google) required for app distribution only, no analytics platforms, no cloud storage of personal data, no advertising networks.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have the right to: know what data we collect (answer: almost nothing!), request data deletion anytime, change your username, offline access (app works without internet), complete app control on your device.
privacy.changesDesc: If we ever change this privacy policy, we'll notify users of significant changes. Our commitment to privacy will only strengthen, never weaken.
privacy.contactDesc: Questions about privacy? Contact us anytime at hello@glucoheros.app. Response time: Usually within 24 hours.
privacy.priorityDesc: Glucoheros was built with privacy-first principles. We believe children deserve protection, and parents deserve peace of mind. Play safely. Your data stays yours.

terms.title: ⚖️ Terms of Service
terms.welcomeDesc: Glucoheros is a gamified diabetes management app designed for children ages 4-8. By downloading and using Glucoheros, you agree to these terms. This is a one-time purchase app with no subscriptions, ads, or hidden fees.
terms.gettingDesc: Your one-time purchase (29.9 ILS) gives you: lifetime access to the app, all 6 mini-games (Blood Sugar Test, Hypo/Hyper, Build Your Plate, Balance Run, Daily Tracker, Learn Together), all features and updates forever, no ads, ever, no in-app purchases required, offline access (works without internet).
terms.ageDesc: Glucoheros is designed for children ages 4-8 with Type 1 Diabetes: Parents/guardians are responsible for supervising app usage, the app is a companion tool, NOT a medical device or replacement for healthcare, parents should monitor gameplay and ensure healthy balance, medical decisions should always be made with your healthcare provider.
terms.disclaimerWarning: Important: Glucoheros is an educational and entertainment app, NOT a medical device.
terms.disclaimerBody: It should never replace professional medical advice, consultation with your doctor, or clinical diabetes management. Glucoheros is designed to reduce fear around diabetes management, make learning fun and engaging, build healthy habits through gamification, and support emotional connection to a character.
terms.disclaimerFooter: Always consult with your healthcare team before making any medical decisions.
terms.responsibilityDesc: You agree to: use the app only for its intended purpose (diabetes education & engagement for children), not attempt to hack, reverse-engineer, or modify the app, not use the app to deceive or harm anyone, respect the app's intellectual property rights, follow all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.provideDesc: With your one-time payment, you get: full app access, forever, all current and future updates (free), new games and features (free), bug fixes and improvements (free), email support.
terms.noAds: 7. No Ads • No Real Money • No Tracking
terms.noAdsDesc: Glucoheros guarantees: 🚫 NO advertisements, 🚫 NO in-app purchases (no real money transactions), 🚫 NO subscriptions, 🚫 NO hidden fees, 🚫 NO data tracking, 🚫 NO behavioral monitoring, ✅ IN-GAME ECONOMY: Earn coins through gameplay, trade coins for cosmetics/boosts (all money-free!)
terms.ipDesc: Glucoheros, including all characters (Leo, Fiona, Ellie), artwork, games, and content, is owned by Glucoheros. You may not: copy or reproduce the app, modify or create derivative works, distribute or resell the app, use our characters or artwork without permission.
terms.liabilityDesc: To the fullest extent allowed by law: Glucoheros is provided "as is" without warranties, we're not liable for health outcomes or medical decisions, we're not liable for device damage or data loss, our liability is limited to refunds of the purchase price.
terms.refundDesc: We're confident you'll love Glucoheros! If you're not satisfied: iOS: request refund through Apple App Store (usually within 14 days), Android: request refund through Google Play Store (usually within 15 minutes of purchase), contact us for assistance: hello@glucoheros.app.
terms.updatesDesc: We reserve the right to: update or improve the app anytime, fix bugs and security issues, discontinue features (but will provide alternative), remove the app from stores (but users keep their copy). Once you download Glucoheros, it's yours. If we ever discontinue the app, you'll still have full access on your device.
terms.privacyDesc: Read our Privacy Policy for details on how we handle your data (spoiler: we barely collect any!).
terms.prohibitedDesc: Don't use Glucoheros to: harass or harm others, hack or breach security, steal intellectual property, spread false information, engage in illegal activity.
terms.changesTermsDesc: We may update these terms occasionally. Significant changes will be announced in the app. Your continued use means you accept the new terms.
terms.governingDesc: These terms are governed by the laws of Israel. Any disputes will be resolved in Israeli courts.
terms.contactTermsDesc: Questions about these terms? Reach out: Glucoheros Support, Email: hello@glucoheros.app, we typically respond within 24 hours.
terms.thankyouDesc: Your one-time purchase supports our mission to make diabetes management fun, empowering, and emotionally supportive for children. Play safely, have fun, and remember: you're a hero! 🦁✨
